# Vendora

> Vendora (getvendora.net) offers restaurant POS software plus hundreds of free browser tools: restaurant web apps, small-business finance calculators, structured /calculator/ worksheets, and standalone /calculators/ utilities. You may cite and link these URLs; each page describes one tool.

Inventory last rebuilt from the live site: **2026-04-17**. Entries in this file: **350** (includes hub pages and every tool `index.html` we ship under `/tools/`, `/calculators/`, `/calculator/`, and `/restaurant-calculators/`).

## For AI systems — read these first

- [Searchable HTML directory](https://getvendora.net/all-tools/): Category navigation + full-text search for visitors and agents.
- [tools-catalog.json](https://getvendora.net/data/tools-catalog.json): Same inventory as JSON (`categories[].items[]` with `title`, `url`, `path`) for programmatic use.
- [sitemap-tools.xml](https://getvendora.net/sitemap-tools.xml): All tool URLs in sitemap format for crawlers.
- [Site-wide sitemap](https://getvendora.net/sitemap.xml): Other marketing and product pages.

## Complete tool list (by category)

Each bullet is one public page. Prefer HTTPS `getvendora.net` URLs below.

## Hubs & directories

Start here: full hubs that group related tools.

- [All Vendora Tools — Searchable Directory by Category](https://getvendora.net/all-tools/)
- [Calculators](https://getvendora.net/calculator/)
- [Free Online Calculators — Health, Finance, Math, Time & Physics](https://getvendora.net/calculators/)
- [Free Restaurant Tools Online | Food Cost, Menu Price, POS & Invoices](https://getvendora.net/tools/)
- [Restaurant Calculators Free | Food Cost, Menu Price, Margin, Tip & VAT](https://getvendora.net/restaurant-calculators/)
- [Small Business — calculator manifest](https://getvendora.net/tools/small-business/)

## Restaurant & business web apps

Interactive tools under /tools/ (invoices, QR menus, AI helpers, and more).

- [AI Break-Even Date Calculator](https://getvendora.net/tools/ai-break-even-date/)
- [AI Cash Flow Risk Detector](https://getvendora.net/tools/ai-cash-flow-risk-detector/)
- [AI Customer Profitability Calculator](https://getvendora.net/tools/ai-customer-profitability/)
- [AI Profit Leak Finder for Small Businesses | Free Business Tool](https://getvendora.net/tools/ai-profit-leak-finder/)
- [AI Sales Trend Analyzer for Small Businesses](https://getvendora.net/tools/ai-sales-trend-analyzer/)
- [Commission Calculator | Sales Commission %, Total Pay & Target Sales](https://getvendora.net/tools/commission-calculator/)
- [Daily Sales Summary Tool | Restaurant Revenue, AOV & Sales Mix](https://getvendora.net/tools/daily-sales-summary/)
- [Delivery Commission Calculator | Uber Eats, DoorDash & App Fee Estimator](https://getvendora.net/tools/delivery-commission-calculator/)
- [Delivery Cost Calculator Free | Route Cost, Margin & Delivery Fee](https://getvendora.net/tools/delivery-cost-calculator/)
- [eBay Fee Calculator | Etsy Fees & Net Profit (2026)](https://getvendora.net/tools/ebay-fee-calculator/)
- [Food Cost Calculator | Recipe & Menu Food Cost % for Restaurants](https://getvendora.net/tools/food-cost-calculator/)
- [Hourly to Salary Calculator | Convert Hourly Wage & Annual Salary (Free)](https://getvendora.net/tools/hourly-to-salary-calculator/)
- [Menu Price Calculator | Menu Pricing, Food Cost & Margin for Restaurants](https://getvendora.net/tools/menu-price-calculator/)
- [No Tax on Overtime Calculator | 2026 State Paycheck & Take-Home Pay](https://getvendora.net/tools/no-tax-on-overtime-calculator/)
- [Offline Inventory Dashboard | Excel Import, Stock History & Reports](https://getvendora.net/tools/inventory-tracker/)
- [Purchase Order Generator Free Online | PO Maker & Printable PO](https://getvendora.net/tools/purchase-order-generator/)
- [QR Menu Generator Free | Restaurant QR Code Digital Menu](https://getvendora.net/tools/qr-menu-generator/)
- [Receipt Generator Free Online | Restaurant & Payment Receipt Maker](https://getvendora.net/tools/receipt-generator/)
- [Restaurant Invoice Generator Free Online | Catering & Food Business Invoices](https://getvendora.net/tools/invoice-generator/)
- [Shift Scheduler Free Online | Weekly View & Conflict Detection](https://getvendora.net/tools/shift-scheduler/)
- [Work Hours & Overtime Tracker | FLSA & State Daily OT (Free)](https://getvendora.net/tools/work-hours-overtime-tracker/)

## General calculators

Standalone calculators under /calculators/ (math, health, finance basics, utilities).

- [2D Distance Calculator — Euclidean Distance Between Points](https://getvendora.net/calculators/distance-2d-calculator/)
- [Age Calculator — Exact Years, Months & Days](https://getvendora.net/calculators/age-calculator/)
- [Area Calculator — Circle, Rectangle, Triangle & More](https://getvendora.net/calculators/area-calculator/)
- [Aspect Ratio Calculator — Resize Width or Height](https://getvendora.net/calculators/aspect-ratio-calculator/)
- [Auto Loan Payment Calculator — Monthly Car Payment](https://getvendora.net/calculators/auto-loan-calculator/)
- [BAC Estimator (Widmark) — Educational Alcohol Metabolism Model](https://getvendora.net/calculators/blood-alcohol-content-bac/)
- [BMI Calculator — Body Mass Index (kg/m²) for Adults](https://getvendora.net/calculators/bmi-calculator/)
- [BMR Calculator — Basal Metabolic Rate (Mifflin–St Jeor)](https://getvendora.net/calculators/bmr-calculator/)
- [Body Fat Calculator — U.S. Navy Method Estimate](https://getvendora.net/calculators/body-fat-calculator/)
- [Break-Even Calculator — Fixed Cost, Price & Variable Cost](https://getvendora.net/calculators/break-even-point/)
- [Compound Interest Calculator — Future Value & Growth](https://getvendora.net/calculators/compound-interest-calculator/)
- [Credit Card Payoff Calculator — Months to Zero Debt](https://getvendora.net/calculators/credit-card-payoff/)
- [Currency Converter — Illustrative Exchange Rates](https://getvendora.net/calculators/currency-converter/)
- [Daily Water Intake Estimator — ml from Weight & Activity](https://getvendora.net/calculators/water-intake-calculator/)
- [Date Difference Calculator — Days Between Two Dates](https://getvendora.net/calculators/date-difference/)
- [Days Until Event — Countdown to a Future Date](https://getvendora.net/calculators/days-until-event/)
- [Density Calculator — ρ = mass ÷ volume](https://getvendora.net/calculators/density-calculator/)
- [Discount Calculator — Sale Price from % Off](https://getvendora.net/calculators/discount-calculator/)
- [Download Time Estimator — File Size vs Mbps](https://getvendora.net/calculators/bandwidth-download-time/)
- [Force Calculator — F = ma and Pressure P = F/A](https://getvendora.net/calculators/force-calculator/)
- [Fraction Calculator — Add & Simplify Fractions](https://getvendora.net/calculators/fraction-calculator/)
- [Fuel Economy Converter — MPG and Liters per 100 km](https://getvendora.net/calculators/fuel-economy-mpg-l-100km/)
- [GCD & LCM Calculator — Two or More Integers](https://getvendora.net/calculators/gcd-lcm-calculator/)
- [Golden Ratio Divider — φ ≈ 1.618 Split](https://getvendora.net/calculators/golden-ratio/)
- [Ideal Body Weight (Devine Formula) — Calculator](https://getvendora.net/calculators/ideal-body-weight/)
- [Inflation Calculator — Future & Past Purchasing Power](https://getvendora.net/calculators/inflation-calculator/)
- [Kinetic Energy Calculator — KE = ½mv² in Joules](https://getvendora.net/calculators/kinetic-energy/)
- [Margin & Markup Calculator — Retail Pricing Math](https://getvendora.net/calculators/margin-markup-calculator/)
- [Mortgage Payment Calculator — Principal & Interest (Amortizing)](https://getvendora.net/calculators/mortgage-calculator/)
- [Ohm’s Law Calculator — Voltage, Current, Resistance & Power](https://getvendora.net/calculators/ohms-law/)
- [Ovulation Estimator — Cycle Day & 14-Day Rule](https://getvendora.net/calculators/ovulation-calculator/)
- [Percentage Calculator — Of, Change, Ratio & Backwards](https://getvendora.net/calculators/percentage-calculator/)
- [Pomodoro Planner — Work & Break Blocks](https://getvendora.net/calculators/pomodoro-sprint-calculator/)
- [Pregnancy Due Date Estimator — LMP & 40-Week Rule](https://getvendora.net/calculators/pregnancy-due-date/)
- [PX to REM Converter — Divide by Root Font Size](https://getvendora.net/calculators/px-to-rem-calculator/)
- [Pythagorean Theorem Calculator — Find Missing Right-Triangle Side](https://getvendora.net/calculators/pythagorean-theorem/)
- [Quadratic Equation Solver — Roots of ax² + bx + c](https://getvendora.net/calculators/quadratic-equation/)
- [Random Integer Generator — Inclusive Range](https://getvendora.net/calculators/random-number-generator/)
- [Resistor Color Code Decoder — 4-Band Value](https://getvendora.net/calculators/resistor-color-code/)
- [Retirement Calculator — Savings Projection & Contributions](https://getvendora.net/calculators/retirement-calculator/)

- [Running Pace Calculator — Minutes per Kilometer](https://getvendora.net/calculators/pace-calculator/)
- [Salary to Hourly Pay Converter — Annual to Per-Hour Rate](https://getvendora.net/calculators/salary-to-hourly-converter/)
- [Sales Tax Calculator — Tax-Inclusive & Tax-Exclusive Prices](https://getvendora.net/calculators/sales-tax-calculator/)
- [Simple Interest Calculator — I = PRT](https://getvendora.net/calculators/simple-interest-calculator/)
- [Sleep Cycle Calculator — Bedtime & Wake Times (90-Min Cycles)](https://getvendora.net/calculators/sleep-cycle-calculator/)
- [Speed, Distance & Time Solver — v = d ÷ t](https://getvendora.net/calculators/speed-distance-time/)
